commands.name: generate

options.name: --aggregate-after-scripts
options.description:
Controls aggregation after scripts. Defaults to true for 
read/test/readsarif; ignored for generate.

options.name: --analyze-suppressed-symbols
options.description:
Enable suppressed-symbol analysis before 
aggregation.

options.name: --baseline
options.description: Path to baseline metrics JSON.

options.name: --baseline-ref
options.description:
Baseline reference label (git commit, build ID, 
etc.).

options.name: --baseline-storage-path
options.description:
Directory where old baseline files are 
archived.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Optional path to .metricsreporter.json. If omitted, the 
file is discovered by walking up from the working directory.

options.name: --coverage-html-dir
options.description:
Directory containing HTML coverage reports for 
hyperlinking.

options.name: --exclude-events
options.description: Exclude events from metrics output.

options.name: --exclude-fields
options.description: Exclude fields from metrics output.

options.name: --exclude-methods
options.description: Exclude methods from metrics output.

options.name: --exclude-properties
options.description: Exclude properties from metrics output.

options.name: --excluded-assemblies
options.description:
Comma/semicolon-separated assembly name patterns to 
exclude.

options.name: --excluded-members
options.description:
Comma/semicolon-separated member name patterns to 
exclude.

options.name: --excluded-types
options.description:
Comma/semicolon-separated type name patterns to 
exclude.

options.name: --input-json
options.description:
Existing metrics-report.json used to generate HTML 
only.

options.name: --log-truncation-limit
options.description:
Maximum number of stdout/stderr characters logged on script
failures. Defaults to 4000.

options.name: --metric-aliases
options.description:
JSON object mapping metric identifiers to alias arrays. CLI
overrides env/config.

options.name: --metrics-dir
options.description:
Root directory for metrics artifacts 
(OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF/baseline).

options.name: --opencover
options.description:
Path to OpenCover coverage XML. Repeat for multiple 
files.

options.name: --output-html
options.description: Path to the resulting metrics-report.html.

options.name: --output-json
options.description: Path to the resulting metrics-report.json.

options.name: --replace-baseline
options.description: Replace baseline when new report differs.

options.name: --roslyn
options.description:
Path to Roslyn metrics XML. Repeat for multiple 
files.

options.name: --run-scripts
options.description:
Controls execution of configured scripts. Defaults to 
true.

options.name: --sarif
options.description:
Path to SARIF file. Repeat for multiple 
files.

options.name: --script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed before aggregation. Repeat for 
multiple scripts.

options.name: --solution-dir
options.description:
Solution directory used for suppressed-symbol 
analysis.

options.name: --solution-name
options.description: Solution name displayed in reports.

options.name: --source-code-folders
options.description:
Comma/semicolon-separated list of source code folder roots 
for suppressed-symbol analysis.

options.name: --suppressed-symbols
options.description:
Path to JSON file where suppressed symbol metadata is 
stored.

options.name: --thresholds
options.description: Inline JSON string with metric thresholds.

options.name: --thresholds-file
options.description:
Path to JSON file with symbol-level 
thresholds.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds for external scripts. Defaults to 
configuration or 900 seconds.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Controls informational logging. Errors are always 
logged.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description:
Working directory used for resolving relative 
paths.

commands.description:
Aggregates metrics from OpenCover/Roslyn/SARIF inputs and 
produces metrics-report.json/metrics-report.html.
examples: generate --metrics-dir build/Metrics --opencover coverage.xml --roslyn metrics.xml --sarif analyzers.sarif --output-json build/Metrics/Report/MetricsReport.g.json

commands.name: read

options.name: --aggregate-after-scripts
options.description:
Controls aggregation after scripts. Defaults to true for 
read/test/readsarif; ignored for generate.

options.name: --all
options.description:
Emit all matching entries instead of only the most severe 
one.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Optional path to .metricsreporter.json. If omitted, the 
file is discovered by walking up from the working directory.

options.name: --group-by
options.description:
Controls grouping of violations (metric, namespace, type, 
method).

options.name: --include-suppressed
options.description:
Include metrics that have been suppressed via 
SuppressMessage attributes.

options.name: --log-truncation-limit
options.description:
Maximum number of stdout/stderr characters logged on script
failures. Defaults to 4000.

options.name: --metric
options.description:
Metric identifier or alias (Complexity, Coupling, 
Maintainability, etc.).

options.name: --metric-aliases
options.description:
JSON object mapping metric identifiers to alias arrays. CLI
overrides env/config.

options.name: --metric-script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed when the specified metric is 
requested. Repeatable.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Namespace prefix to filter symbols (e.g. 
Sample.Loader.Infrastructure).

options.name: --report
options.description:
Path to MetricsReport.g.json (can be provided via 
config).

options.name: --ruleid
options.description:
Optional SARIF rule identifier filter (e.g. CA1506, 
IDE0051).

options.name: --run-scripts
options.description:
Controls execution of configured scripts. Defaults to 
true.

options.name: --script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed before reading. Repeat for 
multiple scripts.

options.name: --symbol-kind
options.description: Symbol level to inspect. Defaults to Any.

options.name: --thresholds-file
options.description:
Optional thresholds file (MetricsReporterThresholds.json) 
used to override report metadata.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds for external scripts. Defaults to 
configuration or 900 seconds.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Controls informational logging. Errors are always 
logged.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description:
Working directory used for resolving relative 
paths.

commands.description:
Reads metric violations for a namespace. Returns the most 
severe violation by default; use --all for full listing.

commands.name: readsarif

options.name: --aggregate-after-scripts
options.description:
Controls aggregation after scripts. Defaults to true for 
read/test/readsarif; ignored for generate.

options.name: --all
options.description:
Emit all matching groups instead of only the most severe 
one.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Optional path to .metricsreporter.json. If omitted, the 
file is discovered by walking up from the working directory.

options.name: --group-by
options.description:
Controls grouping of SARIF violations (metric, namespace, 
type, method, ruleId). Defaults to ruleId.

options.name: --include-suppressed
options.description:
Include metrics that have been suppressed via 
SuppressMessage attributes.

options.name: --log-truncation-limit
options.description:
Maximum number of stdout/stderr characters logged on script
failures. Defaults to 4000.

options.name: --metric
options.description:
SARIF metric identifier (SarifCaRuleViolations, 
SarifIdeRuleViolations) or 'Any'. Defaults to Any.

options.name: --metric-aliases
options.description:
JSON object mapping metric identifiers to alias arrays. CLI
overrides env/config.

options.name: --metric-script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed when the specified metric is 
requested. Repeatable.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
Namespace prefix to filter symbols (e.g. 
Sample.Loader.Infrastructure).

options.name: --report
options.description:
Path to MetricsReport.g.json (can be provided via 
config).

options.name: --ruleid
options.description:
Optional SARIF rule identifier filter (e.g. CA1506, 
IDE0051).

options.name: --run-scripts
options.description:
Controls execution of configured scripts. Defaults to 
true.

options.name: --script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed before reading. Repeat for 
multiple scripts.

options.name: --symbol-kind
options.description: Symbol level to inspect. Defaults to Any.

options.name: --thresholds-file
options.description:
Optional thresholds file (MetricsReporterThresholds.json) 
used to override report metadata.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds for external scripts. Defaults to 
configuration or 900 seconds.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Controls informational logging. Errors are always 
logged.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description:
Working directory used for resolving relative 
paths.

commands.description:
Aggregates SARIF-based metrics (SarifCaRuleViolations, 
SarifIdeRuleViolations) by rule ID for the specified namespace.

commands.name: test

options.name: --aggregate-after-scripts
options.description:
Controls aggregation after scripts. Defaults to true for 
read/test/readsarif; ignored for generate.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Optional path to .metricsreporter.json. If omitted, the 
file is discovered by walking up from the working directory.

options.name: --include-suppressed
options.description:
Include metrics that have been suppressed via 
SuppressMessage attributes.

options.name: --log-truncation-limit
options.description:
Maximum number of stdout/stderr characters logged on script
failures. Defaults to 4000.

options.name: --metric
options.description:
Metric identifier or alias to verify (e.g. Complexity, 
Coupling).

options.name: --metric-aliases
options.description:
JSON object mapping metric identifiers to alias arrays. CLI
overrides env/config.

options.name: --metric-script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed when the specified metric is 
requested. Repeatable.

options.name: --report
options.description:
Path to MetricsReport.g.json (can be provided via 
config).

options.name: --run-scripts
options.description:
Controls execution of configured scripts. Defaults to 
true.

options.name: --script
options.description:
PowerShell script executed before reading. Repeat for 
multiple scripts.

options.name: --symbol
options.description: Fully qualified symbol name (type or member).

options.name: --thresholds-file
options.description:
Optional thresholds file (MetricsReporterThresholds.json) 
used to override report metadata.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds for external scripts. Defaults to 
configuration or 900 seconds.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Controls informational logging. Errors are always 
logged.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description:
Working directory used for resolving relative 
paths.

commands.description:
Checks whether a symbol satisfies the specified metric after 
refactoring.
